channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: NYT Connections Hits 1,000th Puzzle Milestone Tomorrow
item.content:encoded:
NYT Connections, the beloved daily puzzle game, hits a monumental milestone tomorrow, March 7. It will be the 1,000th puzzle the company has produced for the millions of players worldwide, and it comes hand-in-hand with an exclusive reward and social campaign.

While we don’t know what the puzzle will entail (check back later for that), we know that it’s a huge accolade for any daily game to hit. The likes of Wordle have far surpassed the 1,000 mark, but NYT Connections is a younger game.

Will you be there to complete the 1,000th NYT Connections puzzle?

What Do You Get For The 1,000th NY Connections?

When you complete NYT Connections #1000 tomorrow, you’ll unlock an exclusive badge, forever tied to your account, that recognizes you as one of the game’s dedicated players. Of course, it could be your first NYT Connections puzzle, and you’d still get the badge, but the team has accounted for that.

Anyone who gets 1,000 Connections completions at any point will receive another exclusive badge. If you’ve been there consistently since the beginning of NYT Connections, the first puzzle for which launched in June 2023, tomorrow will be the first opportunity you have to unlock the 1,000 Connections badge.

The New York Times’ puzzle editor and creator of Connections, Wyna Liu, wrote:

Experiencing the growth of Connections has been such a wonderful surprise!

I never imagined it would inspire this kind of discourse, humor, vexation and even metagaming. I’ve learned so much over the past few years, and the game has evolved as solvers have gotten wise to its tricks. It’s incredibly meaningful to me that something I love making is something people enjoy talking about — even on the days when it’s a challenge. I’m honored and excited to keep growing this game with them.

To celebrate the 1,000 NYT Connections milestone, New York-based Matchaful sites have assembled a unique layered beverage themed around NYT Connections. The drink contains all the colors you’d associate with the game, and while it has been running since March 2, tomorrow is the last day you can snap up one of the drinks.

If you head to Matchaful on Prince Street tomorrow between 8 AM and 11 AM, you can win exclusive prizes, such as special pajama sets and keepsakes. It all depends on how big an NYT Connections fan you are!

What’s your NY Connections streak right now? Let us know what you’ve achieved on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Ruiner 2 has a new gameplay trailer

Written by

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant's adoration for gaming started on the Amstrad CPC in 1996. Now, he's a multi-platform expert gamer with a deep love for the industry, a passion for esports, and more…

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

item.title: NYT Mini Crossword Hints Today—Answers For Friday, March 6
item.content:encoded:
The NYT Mini Crossword is a popular, quick-to-complete word game to test yourself daily, but some of the puzzles can be difficult to complete, so here are some hints.

If you’ve found yourself stuck on today’s NYT Mini, Insider Gaming has some helpful hints and all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on Friday, March 6, 2026.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of the NYT Mini Crossword. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How to Play NYT Mini Crossword

The NYT Mini Crossword is available to play on the New York Times Games app or website, but, as of September 2025, a New York Times Game subscription is required.

The NYT Games Subscription is priced at $6.95 per month, but there are introductory offers available for other NYT subscriptions that include games access, which might be worth considering.

Without a Games subscription, access to the NYT Mini Crossword is blocked.

NYT Mini Crossword Clues (March 6)

Here are all the clues provided for the NYT Mini Crossword for March 6, 2026.

Across

1 – Mountains on an Evian bottle

5 – Sound effect for a pogo stick

7 – Bert’s buddy

8 – “Bruhhh!”

9 – Candy with collectible dispensers

Down

1 – Presidential nickname of the 1860s

2 – “My Sweet ___” (George Harrison song)

3 – Affix with a thumbtack

4 – Like an unpleasant, mocking comment

6 – “Good grief!”

Additional Clues For NYT Mini (March 6)

Here are some additional clues to help you solve the NYT Mini Crossword on March 6, 2026.

Across

1 – European mountain range

5 – Trampoline sound

7 – ‘Cheers’ character

8 – Bro

9 – Austrian candy that debuted in 1994

Down

1 – President Lincoln, informally

2 – Noble

3 – Tack on a wall

4 – Slyly sarcastic

6 – “Holy moly!”

All NYT Mini Crossword Answers (March 6)

Here are all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on March 6, 2026.

Across

1 – ALPS

5 – BOING

7 – ERNIE

8 – DUDE

9 – PEZ

Down

1 – ABE

2 – LORD

3 – PINUP

4 – SNIDE

6 – GEEZ

When is The Next Game?

The NYT Mini Crossword refreshes daily at 10 PM ET on weekdays and Saturdays, and at 6 PM ET on Sundays.

As such, the next NYT Mini Crossword will be available at 7 PM PT/9 PM CT/10 PM ET/3 AM GMT/2 PM AET.

What is The NYT Mini Crossword?

The NYT Mini Crossword was introduced in 2014 as a shorter and quicker-to-complete game to accompany the main New York Times Crossword, which was initially released in 1942.

Until September 2025, the NYT Mini Crossword was free, but it has now been consolidated into a monthly NYT Games Subscription alongside several other popular games.

Did you struggle with the NYT Mini Crossword today? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more word game hints, check out the hints and answer for today’s Contexto, and take a look at today’s Wordle.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Contexto #1265: Hints & Answer For March 6, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, March 6, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Oily substance
  • Hint 2: Applied to the skin
  • Hint 3: Typically for medicinal purposes

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Bandage
  • Antibiotic
  • Balm
  • Topical
  • Hydrocortisone
  • Salve
  • Lotion
  • Antiseptic
  • Cream

Today’s Contexto Answer For Game #1265 On March 6, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Ointment

Ointment is a smooth, oily substance that is rubbed on the skin for medicinal purposes or as a cosmetic.

When Is The Next Contexto Game After #1265?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on March 7.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Check out some of Insider Gaming’s other word-game guides down below:

  • NYT Connections
  • Wordle

MOBILE APP

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: RUINER 2 Trailer Shows Off Co-Op Gameplay
item.content:encoded:
RUINER 2 has received a new trailer. Now, the development team is touting new features coming to the long-awaited sequel.

RUINER 2 released its latest trailer, confirming that the game will feature co-op. The game expands on the top-down shooter action-RPG gameplay by adding three-player co-op.

“RUINER 2 evolves the fight, not the formula. The opponents are still savage. The crowd still closes in. The only way is still through. Stop killing, and you’re dead,” the Steam page says when describing the plot.

RUINER 2 Introduces Shell System

The Shell System is a key feature in RUINER 2. In single-player, players command up to three Shells, switching in real time to adapt their strategy and unlock Synergies. Synergies are abilities chained across Shells for powerful combos. In co-op, up to three players control their own Shells.

“We are massive ARPG fans, and RUINER 2 is the game we’ve always wanted to play,” said Marek Roefler, Game Director. “We built the Shell System because we love theory-crafting and finding broken combinations, but we hated being locked into a single character for a hundred hours. This game is for players who want to experiment, swap builds on the fly, and discover synergies that tear the screen apart.”

There’s currently no release date scheduled for RUINER 2. Insider Gaming will continue to provide the latest updates on the game as more information becomes available.

Are you excited to play the RUINER sequel? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

item.title: MOUSE: P.I. For Hire Price Revealed
item.content:encoded:
MOUSE: P.I. For Hire is releasing soon, and now, we know how much it’ll cost. The MOUSE: P.I. For Hire team took to social media to reveal that the game will cost $29.99 when it releases on April 16.

The message on social media also notes that the game will feature between 12 and 20 hours of gameplay, depending on player decisions. The game was recently delayed. It was expected to be released on March 19, prior to an announcement on February 23. Learn more about that announcement here.

What to Expect From MOUSE: P.I. For Hire

MOUSE: P.I. For Hire is a first-person shooter with a rubber-hose animation style. If you notice any similarities between lead protagonist Jack Pepper and Mickey Mouse, that’s because this game is one of the first projects that entered development when the Steamboat Willie version of Mickey Mouse hit the public domain.

A short behind-the-scenes documentary was released in October 2025, covering the development of MOUSE. It was shared during the ID@Xbox Fall showcase.

The game is full of charm and cheese. There are also puns, lots of puns. If you want to know more, you can check out our equally pun-filled preview of the game at this link.

Insider Gaming will continue to provide the latest updates on MOUSE: P.I. For Hire as its release date nears. For more first-person shooters coming out in 2026, click here.

Are you excited for MOUSE? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Sword Art Online: Echoes of Aincrad Releasing This July

The next RPG from Bandai Namco is an exciting new installment in the Sword Art Online series titled “Sword Art Online: Echoes of Aincrad.”

PRAGMATA Being Released One Week Earlier

PRAGMATA will be released one week earlier

Project Helix Is Xbox’s Next Console’s Codename

Today, Xbox announced that its next-generation console will be codenamed Project Helix. The new Xbox CEO, Asha Sharma, confirmed its PC hybrid features.

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sword Art Online: Echoes of Aincrad Releasing This July
item.content:encoded:
The next RPG from Bandai Namco is a new installment in the Sword Art Online series titled “Sword Art Online: Echoes of Aincrad.” It is scheduled for release in July. According to the Japanese trailer, the release date is July 9, while the English trailer available on PlayStation’s YouTube channel indicates a release date of July 10.

Bandai Namco previously announced that they would unveil their next RPG on March 5, and it turned out to be the next evolution of the popular game line. The most recent Sword Art Online game was Fractured Daydream, which was released in 2024.

Character Creation is the Center of Echoes of Aincrad

For the first time in Sword Art Online history, the game’s main character will be a creation of an doing something individual player.

According to an IGN preview article, Yosuke Futami, series producer, said that one reason for the change is that the new game takes place in an original story and does not require prior knowledge of the manga or anime. Also, the hope is that players will be more invested in the game if they can create their own character.

The game is set in an MMO, but it’s single-player. Players set up a team of AI allies and set out on their journey. Futami said that the hope was that the in-game world would feel like a dungeon.

Insider Gaming will continue to provide the latest information on this game as more becomes available.

How do you feel about Sword Art Online? Would you check out this new game even if you’re not a fan of the series? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP
